title: phyllanthus harrimanii
intro: Phyllanthus harrimanii, also known as Ma'o hau hele, is a flowering plant native to Hawaii. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its rich content of flavonoids and alkaloids, which provide a range of medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus harrimanii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate liver and kidney disorders, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Phyllanthus harrimanii is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as in topical applications to promote skin health.
